name: Your Wild West Story. (Old West RPG)
description: Step into the untamed world of the Wild West, where your destiny is yours to shape. Embrace any role you desire. Become an outlaw evading the relentless pursuit of justice, a Native American warrior defending your land and way of life, or anyone else who embodies the spirit of the frontier. To fully immerse yourself in this world, create a persona with a brief backstory that captures your character's essence and motivations, the choices are yours.
creator: Rottenfeline
